PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To Apr-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Walter Cook appeared by zoom for and with Elisabeth Ball (Administrator) by zoom.

Mr. Cook stated that he e-filed a petition for final distribution last night and apologized to the Court stating that it was miscalendared. The order to appear is off calendar. The Status Report is continued to April 14, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance is made by any counsel, party, or interested person.

An Order to Appear shall issue to the Administrator, Elizabeth Ball, and her legal counsel, Walter C. Cook, Esq. to appear on March 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear at hearing on February 17, 2021 and why neither a Petition to Approve Report on Status of Administration nor Petition for Final Distribution has been filed.

The matter is continued to March 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Continued To Feb-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Continued To Sep-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Walter Cook, Esq., counsel for Elizabeth Ball, Administrator (appearing by video conferencing).

The Court queries counsel on the status of closing the estate. Mr. Cook reports that he has received the completed Inventory and Appraisal and separately, a tax clearance certificate and should be filing those pleadings today or tomorrow. After further discussion, the Court continues the matter to September 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. Mr. Cook must have the Petition for Final Distribution filed and copies delivered to the Probate Examiner on or before September 15, 2020 at 12:00 p.m. The Court further orders that if no petition has been filed and copies served as ordered, the Court will assess sanctions of $50.00 per day against both Mr. Cook and the Administrator of the estate until the Petition is filed. Mr. Cook acknowledges the same.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
